subject: Q1 Review — Prep Materials Needed
body: Hi, the Q1 review is tomorrow at 2pm. Please send me your team's numbers by end of day today so I can compile the deck.

subject: Scheduled Maintenance Tonight 11pm-2am
body: We will be performing server maintenance tonight from 11pm to 2am. All internal tools will be unavailable during this window.

subject: Re: Project Roadmap — Updated Draft
body: I've attached the updated roadmap with your feedback incorporated. Let me know if you want to discuss before the Friday meeting.

subject: This Week in AI — March Edition
body: Top stories: GPT-5 benchmarks released, open-source models close the gap, and a deep dive into agentic workflows.

subject: Action Required: Benefits Enrollment Closes Friday
body: This is a reminder that the open enrollment window for benefits closes this Friday March 27. Log in to the HR portal to confirm your selections.

subject: Quick question about the API integration
body: Hey, I'm blocked on the auth token refresh logic. Do you have 15 minutes today to pair on it? Lmk what works.

subject: Invoice #4821 — Approved
body: Your submitted invoice #4821 for $3,200 has been approved and will be processed in the next payment cycle (March 31).

subject: Contract Renewal — Signature Needed
body: Hi, our partnership contract is up for renewal. I've sent the updated agreement via DocuSign. Please sign by March 28 to avoid a lapse in service.

subject: Production Deploy — v2.4.1 Successful
body: Just a heads up that v2.4.1 was deployed to production at 6:45am with no issues. Rollback is available if needed.
